THE COURT SETS A HEARING FOR MAY 16, 2017 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302 ON ITS OWN MOTION TO BIFURCATE. DEFENDANTS UNUM GROUP AND THE PAUL REVERE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY SHALL FILE THEIR BRIEF BY 4/24/17. PLAINTIFF VINCENT K. SIEFE DDS AND DEFENDANT DAVE JONES AS COMMISSIONER OF INSURANCE SHALL FILE THEIR OPPOSITION BRIEFS BY 5/8/17. THE COURT DENIES THE PORTION OF DEFENDANTS UNUM GROUP AND THE PAUL REVERE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE BASED ON IMPROPER COURT. (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR DETAILS.) THE COURT WILL ISSUE A FORMAL ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: KELLEY DEYOUNG, CSR #6780, E-MAIL: KELLEYCSR@AOL.COM (302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever Plaintiffs Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Continued To May-16-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Attys. TERRENCE J. COLEMAN, ESQ. and RUDY TAP, ESQ. of Pillsbury & Coleman LLP (Tel: 415-433-8000) appearing for the plaintiff Vincent K. Siefe DDS;
Atty. EDITH SHEA, ESQ. of Burke, Williams & Sorensen, LLP (Tel: 213-236-2815) appearing for defendants Unum Group and The Paul Revere Life Insurance Company;
Atty. HEATHER BRAE HOESTEREY, ESQ. of the California Department of Justice Office of the Attoreny General (Tel: 415-703-5506) appearing for the defendant Dave Jones as Commissioner of Insurance.

The Court and counsel discuss the Court's proposal as to how to proceed in this case. Argument is presented by counsel. The Court orders as follows: The Court sets a hearing for May 16, 2017 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 on its own motion to bifurcate the 1st and 2nd causes of action from the 3rd cause of action, and to have the 3rd cause of action tried first with a hearing and briefing schedule established to have the 3rd cause of action tried sometime before the end of 2017 at a time convenient to the parties. Defendants Unum Group and the Paul Revere Life Insurance Company as presumed proponents of the Court's own motion shall file their brief by 4/24/17. Plaintiff Vincent K. Siefe DDS and defendant Dave Jones as Commissioner of Insurance as presumed opponents to the Court's own motion shall file their opposition briefs by 5/8/17. The Court denies the portion of defendants unum group and the paul revere life insurance company's motion to change venue based on improper court. The Court puts over the portion of defendants unum group and the paul revere life insurance company's motion to change venue based on convenience of witnesses, as well as defendants unum group and the paul revere life insurance company's motion to sever to May 16, 2017 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 (the same date and time as the Court's own motion to bifurcate the writ claim and set a trial date on the writ claim). The Court will issue a formal order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Kelley DeYoung, CSR #6780, e-mail: kelleycsr@aol.com (302/HK)
